description: CompositionPure leather tote bag in red with same colour zippers and yellow stitch detailingThis big tote bag is the ultimate piece of style. With ample space for all that you want to carry, including a spare set of clothes, you are all set to go on that special date or on an evening out with friends. Available in attractive colours like turquoise blue, teal blue, moody grey, in-fashion yellow, sober beige, black and neutral brown, the yellow stitch detailing adds a glam look to this uber stylish tote bag.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
